hooks.command: F="memory/sessions/$(date +%Y-%m-%d).md"; if [ -f "$F" ] && [ $(( $(date +%s) - $(stat -c %Y "$F" 2>/dev/null || echo 0) )) -lt 300 ]; then exit 0; fi; printf '{"decision":"block","reason":"Before stopping: write or append to %s per the CLAUDE.md Session end rule (Summary, Decisions Made, Files Updated, Action Items, Counts). Skip only if this session was purely conversational with zero artifact changes."}' "$F"
